steps.title: Spot the location reference
steps.content: The first sentence names India as the country of origin. The blank must connect the production statistic to that same location.

steps.title: Apply the location signal
steps.content:
B (There) functions as a locative adverb pointing back to India, establishing where the production statistic applies. The other three don't establish the location reference; they introduce consequence, emphasis, or elaboration instead.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
